scripts.build: npm --workspace @virtual-agency/shared run build && npm --workspace @virtual-agency/providers run build && npm --workspace @virtual-agency/api run build && npm --workspace @virtual-agency/web run build
scripts.build:packages: npm --workspace @virtual-agency/shared run build && npm --workspace @virtual-agency/providers run build
scripts.test: npm run build:packages && npm run test --workspaces --if-present
scripts.typecheck: npm run build:packages && npm run typecheck --workspaces --if-present
